_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Wildberger (2005) Divine Proportions ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 (spread/quadrance) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5 (Pell equation). -->
description: (2,1): I=2, G_tilde=5, s=1/5, |s-1/3|=2/15=2/(3*5). Non-Pell; I=2 means spread deviates by 2/(3*G_tilde).
